summary.lv: IT Camp partneris LevelPath (uzņēmuma iepirkumu/iegādes B2B SaaS platforma) meklē Solution Implementation konsultantu, kas ieviesīs SaaS risinājumus uzņēmumu klientiem.
summary.en: IT Camp's partner LevelPath (a public-facing B2B SaaS platform for enterprise sourcing/purchasing) is hiring a Solution Implementation Consultant to roll out SaaS solutions for enterprise customers.
